text: Testing plays a crucial role in software development. Unit tests check individual components, while integration tests verify that different parts work together correctly. Many developers use test-driven development (TDD), where they write tests before writing the actual code. This approach helps catch problems early and reduces bugs. With a good test suite, developers gain more confidence to make changes. They can refactor or add new features without worrying about breaking existing functionality. When tests pass automatically, teams can release updates faster and more reliably. In short, testing saves time, improves code quality, and builds trust in the software.
